PrimeWest External Recipient Warning

Please sideload your add-in to see app body.

Review how the add-in works

  1. Create a new message in New Outlook.
  2. Add a recipient whose SMTP domain is not listed in src/launchevent/internal-domains.js.
  3. Verify that a caution banner appears while composing.
  4. Select Send. A Smart Alerts prompt should appear and let you either stop or send anyway.

This add-in warns when external recipients are detected. It does not automatically convert the message to a secure-mail workflow.

Before testing in your environment, replace the domain list in src/launchevent/internal-domains.js with your organization's accepted internal mail domains.
